design_philosophy.identity: Organic Tech - A precision tool that feels like a garden. Warm, tactile, yet data-rich.
core_principles: Nature is messy, UI is clean: Use whitespace to tame the complexity of biology.
Touch-First: Buttons and cards must be thumb-friendly (min 44px hit areas).
Data needs sunlight: Charts and logs should feel airy, not cramped.
Color as Status: Green is good, Yellow is warning (water needed), Red is critical (pest/disease).

typography.installation_instructions: Import fonts from Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600&family=Outfit:wght@500;600;700;800&display=swap');

usage_rules.headings: Use Outfit for all Headings (h1-h4). Tracking tight (-0.02em). Weight 600 or 700.
usage_rules.body: Use Manrope for all UI text, labels, and inputs. Excellent readability for numbers.

layout.spacing_system: Use generous padding. p-4 is minimum for containers. p-6 or p-8 preferred for cards.
layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for cards, rounded-xl for buttons, rounded-full for badges.

mobile_navigation.style: Fixed bottom, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-lg), h-16 or h-20.

cards.default: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-2xl border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-xl h-12 px-6 font-semibold shadow-md active:translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-xl h-12 px-6 font-medium
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-xl h-12 px-6 font-medium
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent/10 text-foreground hover:text-accent rounded-xl h-10 px-4
buttons.floating_action: fixed bottom-20 right-6 h-14 w-14 rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center z-50 hover:scale-110 transition-transform

badges.status_success: bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-400 border border-green-200 dark:border-green-800
badges.status_warning: bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 dark:bg-yellow-900/30 dark:text-yellow-400 border border-yellow-200 dark:border-yellow-800
badges.status_danger: bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-900/30 dark:text-red-400 border border-red-200 dark:border-red-800
badges.tag: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground text-xs font-medium px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full

inputs.default: h-12 rounded-xl border-input bg-background px-4 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2

textures.grain: Use a subtle SVG noise overlay on the main background for texture (opacity 0.03).

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use for the Bottom Nav and Sticky Headers: bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-border/50

icons.style: Stroke width 2px for small icons, 1.5px for large. Rounded line caps.

animation.principles: Organic & Smooth. Avoid robotic linear ease.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-muted-foreground has at least 4.5:1 contrast against background.
accessibility.touch_targets: All interactive elements must have min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px].

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'shadcn/ui' components for complex interactions (Dialog, Drawer, Calendar, Form, Select).
Use 'Drawer' component from shadcn for mobile bottom sheets (very important for 'Add Task' or 'Crop Details').
For the Dashboard, use a Bento Grid layout: 'grid grid-cols-2 gap-4'. Key metric cards take 1 cell, 'Recent Tasks' takes 2 cells wide.
Implement the 'Floating Action Button' (FAB) on the Dashboard and Cultivos screens for adding new items.
The 'Bitácora' (Logbook) should look like a social feed: Image (optional) + Text + Tags + Date.
Use the provided image URLs for placeholders. Do not leave images empty.
Ensure 'dark mode' support is robust. Test text colors on dark backgrounds.
